title: poa angustifolia
intro: Poa angustifolia, also known as Blue Fescue Grass, is a type of perennial grass native to the mountainous regions of North America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Poa angustifolia include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and support immune function. Poa angustifolia can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
